mapper.insert: INSERT INTO elderly_nurse(elderly_id, nurse_item_id, nurse_user_id, nurse_time, remark, is_deleted) VALUES(#{elderlyId}, #{nurseItemId}, #{nurseUserId}, #{nurseTime}, #{remark}, 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE elderly_nurse
elderly_id = #{elderlyId}, nurse_item_id = #{nurseItemId}, nurse_user_id = #{nurseUserId}, nurse_time = #{nurseTime}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE elderly_nurse SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM elderly_nurse WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT en.*, e.name as elderlyName, ni.item_name as nurseItemName, u.real_name as nurseUserName FROM elderly_nurse en LEFT JOIN elderly e ON en.elderly_id = e.id LEFT JOIN nurse_item ni ON en.nurse_item_id = ni.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON en.nurse_user_id = u.id WHERE en.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY en.create_time DESC

SELECT en.*, e.name as elderlyName, ni.item_name as nurseItemName, u.real_name as nurseUserName FROM elderly_nurse en LEFT JOIN elderly e ON en.elderly_id = e.id LEFT JOIN nurse_item ni ON en.nurse_item_id = ni.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON en.nurse_user_id = u.id WHERE en.elderly_id = #{elderlyId} AND en.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY en.create_time DESC
